_comment: defaultAction is SCMP_ACT_ALLOW intentionally. libseccomp ORs multiple NE conditions on the same arg index, so ERRNO+full-allowlist approach cannot reliably block a single domain. Explicit EQ deny rules above ALLOW default are the only reliable pattern. Do NOT change to SCMP_ACT_ERRNO without re-verifying AF_ALG is still blocked. Note: using this profile with --security-opt replaces Docker's default profile entirely; only AF_ALG is blocked here by design (single-purpose profile).
